title: Senior Financial Analyst - Motilal Oswal - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Motilal Oswal - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Motilal Oswal in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Motilal Oswal:
Motilal Oswal is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Motilal Oswal!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
